name: Multify
overview: Unified notification plugin for Jellyfin — send notifications to Telegram, Gotify, ntfy, and generic webhooks with flexible filtering and templating.
description:
Multify is a unified notification plugin for Jellyfin that sends notifications to multiple destinations:

- **Telegram** — Bot API with HTML/Markdown support, forum topics, silent messages
- **Gotify** — Priority, custom title
- **ntfy** — Priority 1-5, tags, markdown, attachments, auth tokens
- **Generic Webhook** — Custom headers, fields, full JSON payload control

**Features:**
- Per-destination notification type filters (PlaybackStart, ItemAdded, UserCreated, etc.)
- User filter (Only Selected / All Except)
- Library filter (Only Selected / All Except)
- Item type toggles (Movies, Episodes, Series, Seasons, Albums, Songs, Videos)
- Base64-encoded Handlebars-like templates with `{{Placeholder}}` syntax
- MDBList ratings enrichment (IMDb/TMDb)
- Dashboard alerts for notification events
- Scheduled cleanup of stale Telegram message IDs
- Test notification endpoint for UI validation

**Configuration:** Dashboard → Plugins → Multify → Configure
Multify → Configure

**Requires Jellyfin 10.12+**

versions.changelog:
## v0.0.3 — Jellyfin 10.12 Compatibility & Code Quality

### Fixed
- DI race condition: config now resolved via factory at runtime
- Stale config after save: `PluginConfiguration` registered as Scoped
- Config save failure: corrected plugin GUID in config.js
- Notification matching: all filters (type, user, library, item type) now evaluated correctly
- Raw JSON in test notifications: template now applied when provided
- ObjectDisposedException in scheduled tasks during plugin reload

### Added
- `CleanupTelegramStoreTask` — weekly (Sun 3 AM) cleanup of stale Telegram message IDs
- `Jellyfin.Data` package reference for explicit dependency
- `Microsoft.AspNetCore.App` framework reference
- `Directory.Build.props` for centralized version management
- `Policies.RequiresElevation` constant for API authorization

### Changed
- Target framework: `net9.0` (was net9.0, corrected from net10.0)
- Jellyfin packages: `10.*-*` to allow pre-release on NuGet.org
- Logging: option loading demoted to Debug level
- `ReplacePlaceholders` consolidated to `BaseOption` (internal static)
- Deep copy of webhook payload dictionaries to prevent mutation
- YouTube ID parsing: `HttpUtility.ParseQueryString` instead of manual substring
- Plugin GUID: replaced placeholder with `8e7a42b2-6a49-40e5-a05d-780ba1942cd1`

### Removed
- Dead code: unreachable branches, unused methods, duplicate log lines
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Http` package (included in framework)

### Security
- API endpoints use `Authorize(Policy = Policies.RequiresElevation)`
